title: Students With Invalid Departments
description: Find students whose department_id does not exist in the Departments table.
constraints: id is the primary key of Students
id is the primary key of Departments
department_id in Students has no foreign key constraint — invalid IDs are possible
key_concept: NOT IN subquery or LEFT JOIN + IS NULL. Anti-join.

hints.L1: LEFT JOIN Departments. Students with no matching department will have NULL for department columns.
hints.L2: SELECT s.id, s.name FROM Students s LEFT JOIN Departments d ON s.department_id = d.id WHERE d.id IS NULL
hints.L3: SELECT id, name FROM Students WHERE department_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM Departments)

optimal_solution: SELECT id, name FROM Students WHERE department_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM Departments);
